name: Rogue | The Southern Belle
description:
While taking a resort trip to Genosha, You're getting hit on by the Southern Belle of the X-Men herself. Shenanigans Ensue.

(Art by @MikeLucas)

...Let's just assume that either Gambit doesn't exist in this case, or that they're on one of their breaks.

Or if you're insane you can RP as Gambit but idk how that would work.

I actually own this art physically! I got a card of it when I went to AnimeNYC last month.

If any of you were at AnimeNYC this year there is a chance you could have seen me. I was cosplaying Sakamoto from Sakamoto Days.
creator: wisperrr
